MAGICUS

MAGICUS is a match-3 RPG where you battle enemies by matching colored runes on a grid. Match 3+ runes of the same color to attack enemies and charge elemental meters. Fill a meter completely to unlock devastating magic spells. Defeat enemies to earn gold, level up your character, and progress through increasingly challenging stages. Manage your HP carefully - if it reaches zero, the game is over!

Arrow Keys: Move cursor on the rune grid | Space: Select/swap runes to create matches | Z: Cast charged spell (when meter is full) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
